act_name: The Value Added Tax and Supplementary Duty Act
section_title: Death or insolvency of a taxpayer.—If, after the death of a taxpayer or
content:
105. Death or insolvency of a taxpayer.—If, after the death of a taxpayer or
the declaration of a taxpayer as bankrupt, the economic activity of such taxpayer is
carried on by any Trustee or Executor of property of such taxpayer, such Trustee or
Executor shall, for the purposes of this Act, be treated as a taxpayer.
